text:
Once upon a time in the quiet town of Everlight, there lived a young girl named Lily. She lived in a cozy cottage adorned with flower pots and colorful drapes. Her garden was paradise; birds sang, bees buzzed, and she tended lovingly to her rare orchids.

Lily had an unusual talent. She could hear voices in her sleep. She would wake up sometimes in the night with a start, hearing stories of adventure and wonder. Her family didn't understand these revelations, but she loved listening to them.

One summer night, she heard something about a lost golden hare deep in the Everglades. Intrigued, she decided to seek it out. Her parents questioned her every step of the way, but Lily was adamant.

After walking through marshes and over bridges, she finally reached a clearing with a pond she didn't recognize. There stood a golden hare, munching on a carrot.
